# WI-QUIC-RFC9000-0020 - QUIC RFC 9000 Long-Header ACK Piggyback Work Item

## Summary

Implement and prove pending ACK prefixing for live Initial and Handshake CRYPTO packet construction without broadening retry/replay, retransmission, interop, or public API claims.

## Requirements Addressed

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P2P1-0009
- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S13P2P1-0010

## Design Inputs

- ARC-QUIC-RFC9000-0020

## Planned Changes

- Extend the long-header CRYPTO packet builders with a transient prefix-frame payload used for ACK frame bytes.
- Wire the runtime Initial and Handshake CRYPTO flush paths to prepend pending ACK frames for the matching packet number space.
- Mark piggybacked Initial and Handshake ACK frames as sent under the protected packet number after successful packet tracking.
- Preserve existing no-pending-ACK CRYPTO packet layout.
- Keep retry bootstrap replay, retried Initial replay, and CRYPTO retransmission builders outside this slice.
- Add focused positive, negative, deterministic fuzz/property, and BenchmarkDotNet coverage for the long-header packet-builder path.

## Out of Scope

- Retry bootstrap replay ACK piggybacking.
- Retried Initial replay ACK piggybacking.
- CRYPTO retransmission ACK piggybacking.
- Application Data stream and NEW_TOKEN ACK piggybacking already owned by earlier slices.
- A general delayed-ACK timer policy.
- Endpoint interop success classification.
- Public API behavior.

## Verification Plan

Run the focused RFC 9000 S13P2P1-0010 requirement-home tests, run the full S13P2P1 requirement-home set, run the long-header packet-protection benchmark suite with BenchmarkDotNet Dry and Short jobs, render/check the touched SpecTrace artifacts, validate JSON and preserve standing failures if present, run `git diff --check`, and preserve evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-long-header-ack-piggyback/` and `artifacts/benchmark-baseline/20260425-rfc9000-long-header-ack-piggyback/`.

## Completion Notes

Completed as a bounded live Initial and Handshake CRYPTO packet-composition floor. Broader retry/replay/retransmission and delayed-ACK scheduling behavior remains outside this work item.
